recent_calls.summary: The user called to set up an appointment and was promptly transferred to a live agent for assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.

The user called to set up an appointment for heating and cooling service due to pipes freezing and no air flow. The agent collected all necessary information including the user's name, address, and preferred appointment time, and confirmed the details. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended successfully with a promise of follow-up contact.

The user called to schedule an appointment but mentioned they had already submitted a request and spoken to someone else who would call them back. The agent attempted to gather more details about the service but the user ended the call before providing further information.

David Doddigarla called to report an emergency issue with his heating and cooling units not cooling for about five days. The agent confirmed details, noted the emergency, and assured that a technician would contact him soon. David expressed interest in maintenance programs and digital thermostat upgrades, and he provided positive feedback about the call experience.

The user called to inquire about a technician appointment. The agent confirmed the user's details but found no appointment on file and offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative. The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user called to request a service for a Freon refill on their air conditioning through American Home Shield. The agent collected and confirmed the user's details, including the dispatch number, service address, and contact information. The user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs, and the call concluded with the agent confirming that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing will contact the user soon.
The user requested to speak with a customer representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to scheduling, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate department. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called regarding an HVAC tune-up recommended by American Home Shield and wanted to speak to a live customer representative. The AI assistant confirmed the service type and transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

The user called to inquire about a technician who was supposed to return to seal wiring at their home but had not yet come back. The agent apologized for the delay and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, greeted the user and initiated the transfer without any issues.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.

Ayanna called to make an emergency appointment for home warranty heating and cooling service because her AC was not working. The agent confirmed details including the dispatch number and service address, and assured Ayanna that the team would reach out soon. Ayanna declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the quick and easy experience.

The user called to check the status of a home warranty scheduling job for an air conditioner under the name Isabella Looney or Jason. The agent could not find an appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent.

Ryan called to schedule a technician visit for an issue with his upstairs cooling system that turns on but won't stay on. The agent booked an appointment for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, at 12 PM and confirmed the details with Ryan. The call ended with Ryan declining to provide feedback.
The agent initiated the call and asked the user for their service address ZIP code, but the user hung up immediately after the greeting without responding.
The user called and provided their ZIP code, then requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Sharilyn, contacted Budget to schedule an urgent repair for her cooling system, which was not working. The agent confirmed details including the service address and ownership, and then transferred the call to a live agent for immediate assistance. The user declined information about maintenance programs, requesting to speak to someone immediately.
The user called and requested to speak to someone. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user called to schedule a cooling system service and thermostat check under their home warranty but did not have the dispatch number. The agent confirmed the details and assured the user that the team would assist with the dispatch number and service scheduling. The user was satisfied and ended the call without further requests.

The user, Dorothy Sorrell, called to clarify a confusing text about an appointment but no appointment was found in the system. The agent offered to leave a message or transfer to a live representative, and the user requested a transfer, which was completed successfully.
The user called and requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another representative. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.
The call was very brief and did not progress beyond initial greetings. The user did not clearly communicate their needs before hanging up.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without responding or engaging in the conversation.
The user called and requested to speak to the front office manager. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to the appropriate number.

Janice called to inquire about the opening hours and to report an issue regarding an estimate that was sent to her instead of being handled by her home warranty company. The agent acknowledged the issue and assured Janice that the team would review it and provide a callback after opening at 8 AM. Janice requested a callback, which was noted by the agent.

The user called to report that their hot water heater is not working but indicated it is not an emergency and can be addressed during a service appointment. The agent collected the user's ZIP code and full service address for scheduling.

The user called to verify the time of an AC technician appointment but the agent was unable to confirm the appointment as it was before business hours. The agent took note of the request and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day.

The user called to reschedule a routine heating and air conditioning maintenance appointment due to work conflicts and preferred a weekend slot. The agent confirmed the updated service address and contact details, and the user expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs. The agent assured that the team would reach out soon to confirm the rescheduling and provide additional information.

The user called to make an emergency appointment for air conditioning repair because their air conditioner keeps shutting off and the thermostat is also not working. The agent documented the issues, marked the call as urgent, and informed the user that a representative will call back on the next business day. The user was satisfied with the assistance and did not request further help.

The user called to schedule appointments and inquired about air conditioning services. The conversation was somewhat unclear and disjointed, with the user mentioning other unrelated topics. The call ended without a clear resolution or appointment being scheduled.

The user, Yolanda, called to make a service appointment for heating and cooling because her thermostat isn't working. She requested a regular service appointment for Friday evening at her address in Ferguson, Missouri, with no special instructions. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that the team would reach out the next business day to confirm the appointment.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and the user responding, but no further conversation took place before the user hung up.

The user called to schedule a routine HVAC maintenance appointment and specified a preference for Friday after 8 AM with contact after 4 PM. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that the team would reach out the next business day to confirm availability. The call ended successfully with all necessary information collected.

The call was an automated message from Dr. Adams, the building principal of Haysville West High School, informing parents about backpack policies and early dismissal dates. The user listened to the message and then ended the call. No further interaction occurred.

The user called to schedule a full AC tune-up appointment for Wednesday, the twentieth, and provided all necessary details including name, address, and contact information. The agent confirmed the appointment details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would follow up to confirm. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Derek, called after hours requesting to be connected with Nicole. The agent informed him that calls cannot be connected after hours but offered to take a message for Nicole to return the call on the next business day. Derek confirmed that Nicole had returned his call and asked him to call back.

Derek Pallardy called to report a steady drip from the pressure regulator that persists after a previous repair. The issue is non-emergency and related to plumbing. He provided his availability before 2 PM each day this week for a technician visit, and the agent confirmed the details and assured a follow-up for scheduling.

The user called Budget's after-hours assistant but hung up shortly after the agent introduced herself and began to explain the service. The call lasted only 13 seconds and ended abruptly without any further interaction.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the ZIP code. No further information was exchanged.

The user called to inquire about a quote for replacing their heating system, which stopped working two months ago. The agent scheduled a morning appointment on Thursday for an in-home quote and noted the user's request for a call before finalizing the appointment. The user provided positive feedback about the friendly communication during the call.

The user called after hours to report inaccurate technician notes and requested customer service follow-up. The agent documented the issue and informed the user that a representative would call back on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user called to confirm and request an appointment for cooling service, specifying a preference for either May 19th or 20th, ultimately confirming May 20th. The agent noted the request and informed the user that the team would follow up on the next business day. The user decided to call back tomorrow for further details.

The user, Rosie from First American Home Warranty, called Budget's after-hours line seeking a vendor to assist with service calls in their market. The agent informed Rosie that no live assistance was available after hours and took a message with Rosie's contact details. The call ended without a live conversation due to after-hours timing.

The user, Dianne, requested a cooling service appointment because her cooling system is not working and will not turn on. She scheduled the service for Wednesday, May 20th at 8 AM, and the agent confirmed the service address and details. The agent informed her that the team will confirm availability on the next business day.
